text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, well, thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I'm glad I placed, but I can't shake this
feeling that it's some kind of fate.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't an impressive first place, nor was it a
close second.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
A steady third place. What can I say? It's very
"me."
choice_data_list: But it's a great result—there's no denying that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I know. I might not look like it, but I am
happy about it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But thinking about the future, I need to take it up
a notch. Or two, even.
choice_data_list: Let's aim for a solid first next time!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hey now, let's not go crazy here! Do you even
know what that means?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
First off, isn't part of your job to treat me to some
nice sushi to celebrate third place?
choice_data_list:
Then, I'll get you even fancier sushi when you
get first place!

Then, I'll get you even fancier sushi when you
get first place!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Okay, first it is... No, it's too hard! But maybe...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ugh! It's not fair to use sushi like that!
